how_it_works.title: How LifeFlow Works
how_it_works.subtitle: We've simplified the journey from confusion to resolution into three clear steps.

step1.title: Step 1: Describe Situation
step1.description: Tell us what's happening in your own words. No legal forms or complex jargon required.

step2.title: Step 2: AI Understands Context
step2.description: Our engine analyzes your situation, identifies applicable laws, and determines your rights.

step3.title: Step 3: Guided Support
step3.description: Receive a personalized step-by-step plan with document checklists and clear instructions.

categories.title: What Can LifeFlow Help You With?
categories.subtitle: Explore our service domains. Hover over each card to see what you can achieve with LifeFlow.ai.

identity.title: Identity & Government Services
identity.description: Verify your persona. Guidance on Aadhaar updates, PAN corrections, Passport applications, and Government IDs.

insurance.title: Insurance & Finance
insurance.description: Navigate claim rejections, policy disputes, and financial appeals with clear, human-explained steps.

property.title: Property & Documentation
property.description: Simplify ownership transfers, rental agreements, and property registration without legal jargon.

family.title: Family & Personal
family.description: Manage marriage certificates, succession planning, and family documentation with sensitivity and clarity.

work.title: Workplace & Employment
work.description: Resolve PF/ESI issues, salary disputes, and termination concerns with expert procedural guidance.

more.title: More for Exploration
more.description: Sign up to unlock 10+ professional domains, AI journey tracking, and personalized life-flow guidance.

home.what_can_help: What situation can LifeFlow help you navigate today?
home.no_situations_desc: Describe a situation or explore services to get started.

footer.description: Empowering people to navigate life's administrative and legal challenges with clarity, guidance, and confidence.

about.subtitle: LifeFlow.ai was built on a single belief — that navigating government systems, legal rights, and life's paperwork should never feel impossible.
about.mission_desc1: Millions of people face bureaucratic and legal challenges every day. Most of them don't know where to start.
about.mission_desc2: LifeFlow.ai exists to change that. We combine AI reasoning with domain expertise to give every person a clear, confident path forward.
about.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of people who've found clarity through LifeFlow.ai.
